$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the app identity (ADR-APP-031). Edit ONLY here, then run `npm run identity:sync`. Never hand-edit the derived name/identifier in package.json, Cargo.toml, tauri.conf.json, tauri.dev.conf.json, src/lib/app.ts or index.html — `identity:check` (in check:all) fails on drift.
description: Cross-platform desktop application shell (Tauri 2 + React) with HUD design system, structured logging and governance.
